apps.name: Legacy OpenEMR
apps.description: Pinned original OpenEMR application running through Docker Compose.

seeds.name: Gold test dataset v1
seeds.description: Resets the legacy data tables and applies the 1,000-patient shared synthetic gold dataset.

seeds.name: Starter example patients
seeds.description: Imports the bundled OpenEMR example provider users and 14 patient demographics as the first visible seed.

tests.name: Baseline smoke test
tests.description: Checks health endpoint, login page, and local admin login.

tests.name: Native PHPUnit isolated suite
tests.description: Runs OpenEMR's upstream isolated PHPUnit suite in stable mode inside the pinned OpenEMR container.

tests.name: Native Jest JavaScript suite
tests.description: Runs OpenEMR's upstream JavaScript Jest suite for CCDA utilities and jsPDF compatibility.

tests.name: Gold database contract
tests.description: Runs normalized database probes against the seeded legacy MariaDB baseline.

tests.name: HTTP functional contract
tests.description: Runs health, login form, and application shell checks against the legacy baseline.

tests.name: Playwright UI contract
tests.description: Runs browser login, chart, encounter, appointment, billing, and lab-result checks against the legacy UI.

tests.name: Workflow mutation contract
tests.description: Runs deterministic demographics, scheduling, encounter-detail, clinical-list, message, prescription, billing, and lab mutation workflows with pre/post probes.

tests.name: Legacy readiness plan
tests.description: Runs the read-only database, HTTP, and UI suites as a curated baseline readiness plan.

tests.name: Isolated mutation plan
tests.description: Runs the workflow mutation suite with per-test gold-data reseeding for strongest isolation.

tests.name: Slice 1 readiness plan
tests.description: Runs the shared patient search/chart-summary parity plan against the legacy target for side-by-side comparison with the modernized target.

tests.name: Slice 2 scheduling plan
tests.description: Runs the shared future appointment list/detail parity plan against the legacy target for side-by-side comparison with the modernized target.

tests.name: Slice 3 encounters plan
tests.description: Runs the shared encounter SOAP/vitals detail parity plan against the legacy target for side-by-side comparison with the modernized target.

tests.name: Slice 4 clinical lists plan
tests.description: Runs the shared problems, allergies, medications, and prescriptions parity plan against the legacy target for side-by-side comparison with the modernized target.

tests.name: Slice 5 messaging plan
tests.description: Runs the shared portal-enabled patient message parity plan against the legacy target for side-by-side comparison with the modernized target.

tests.name: Slice 6 procedures plan
tests.description: Runs the shared completed lab procedure result parity plan against the legacy target for side-by-side comparison with the modernized target.

tests.name: Slice 7 billing plan
tests.description: Runs the shared fee sheet billing parity plan against the legacy target for side-by-side comparison with the modernized target.

tests.description: Runs the shared users and facilities administration parity plan against the legacy target for side-by-side comparison with the modernized target.

tests.name: Full parity plan
tests.description: Runs the target-neutral full parity plan that will later execute against both legacy and modernized targets.

tests.name: Full legacy parity suite
tests.description: Runs database, HTTP, Playwright UI, and workflow mutation suites against the seeded legacy baseline.

apps.name: Modernized OpenEMR
apps.description: From-scratch modernized OpenEMR target using React, ASP.NET Core, and PostgreSQL.

seeds.name: Gold test dataset v1
seeds.description: Resets the modernized PostgreSQL tables and applies the 1,000-patient shared synthetic gold dataset.

tests.name: Modernized smoke test
tests.description: Checks API health, anchor patient search, chart summary, patient demographics mutation, patient registration lifecycle, scheduling, encounters, encounter metadata mutation, clinical lists, messages, document lifecycle, document sign-off, document denial, document metadata refiling, document archive restore, document content replacement, external-link documents, procedure results, procedure mutation, fee sheet billing, billing mutation, administration directory, access control, user mutation, facility mutation, operational reports, and operational reports CSV export.
